PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alec Harrington for Paul Dubendris.

Mr. Harrington stated that courtesy copies of the amended petition and the proof of service have been delivered to the Court. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. Status on close of estate is set for November 21, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Tim Kneis. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
